learningObjectives: Use core leisure and entertainment vocabulary at A2 level.
Use phrasal verbs pick up, find out and take off in everyday contexts.
Use gerunds and infinitives after common verbs like enjoy, want and decide.
Identify the writer's purpose and intended audience in a short blog post.
Follow everyday social exchanges about plans for concerts and exhibitions.
Write a short message inviting a friend to a cultural event.
Answer interview questions about free time and entertainment preferences.
grammarFocus: Phrasal verbs: pick up, find out, take off
Gerunds and infinitives after common verbs

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: We went to a jazz concert in the park.
The photography exhibition closes next week.
I picked up a free magazine at the arts centre.
You can download the programme from the website.
We spent the evening streaming a film at home.
I read a review of the concert online.
The audience clapped loudly at the end.
Student tickets are cheaper on Fridays.
Pick up a programme at the door.
There is a comedy show on Friday evening.
The concert venue is in the city centre.

grammarReference.structure: Phrasal verbs: pick up, find out, take off
grammarReference.explanation: Pick up can mean collect (pick up a magazine) or learn casually (pick up a skill). Find out means discover information (find out the time). Take off can mean remove clothes/shoes or become successful (the show took off).
examples: I picked up a free magazine at the entrance.
We found out that student tickets are cheaper.
The dancers took off their shoes on stage.
Did you find out when the exhibition closes?
commonMistakes: I found the information (×) → I found out the time (✓) [when discovering news]
I picked up my shoes (×) → I took off my shoes (✓)
I found out a magazine (×) → I picked up a magazine (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Gerunds and infinitives after common verbs
grammarReference.explanation: Some verbs are followed by -ing (enjoy, finish, mind): enjoy watching. Others take to + infinitive (want, decide, hope): want to download. Like/love/start can take both with similar meaning at A2.
examples: She decided to download the app.
They hope to see the exhibition tomorrow.
commonMistakes: I enjoy to go to concerts (×) → I enjoy going to concerts (✓)
She decided downloading the app (×) → She decided to download the app (✓)
We finished to read the review (×) → We finished reading the review (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Leisure and Entertainment Words
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve leisure and entertainment words at KET A2 level.

exercises.title: Learn: Entertainment Word Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: A live music event with a band or orchestra is a _____.
questions.explanation: Concert (buổi hòa nhạc) là sự kiện âm nhạc trực tiếp. Performance rộng hơn.

questions.questionText: A public show of art or photos in a gallery is an _____.
questions.explanation: Exhibition (triển lãm) trưng bày tác phẩm. Review là bài đánh giá.

questions.questionText: A thin book with articles and photos, sold weekly or monthly, is a _____.
questions.explanation: Magazine (tạp chí) có bài viết định kỳ. Programme là chương trình sự kiện.

questions.questionText: To save a file from the internet onto your phone means to _____.
questions.explanation: Download (tải xuống) lưu file từ mạng. Streaming là xem trực tuyến.

questions.questionText: Watching films or shows online without downloading is _____.
questions.explanation: Streaming (phát trực tuyến) xem qua internet. Concert là trực tiếp.

questions.questionText: The people who watch a show in a theatre or hall are the _____.
questions.explanation: Audience (khán giả) người xem biểu diễn. Venue là địa điểm.

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the entertainment words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp nghĩa rõ ràng. Performance và concert có thể liên quan nhưng khác nhau.

pairs.right: an act of presenting music, dance or drama live
an article that gives an opinion about a show or film
a piece of paper or code that lets you enter an event
the place where a concert or show happens

exercises.title: Check: Vocab Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer for each question.

questions.questionText: Mai read an online _____ before buying tickets for the comedy show.
questions.explanation: Review (bài đánh giá) giúp quyết định mua vé. Programme là chương trình.

questions.questionText: You can _____ the centre's app to see the exhibition timetable.
questions.explanation: Download (tải) app về điện thoại. Streaming là xem phim.

questions.questionText: The jazz _____ in the park starts at seven o'clock.
questions.explanation: Concert (hòa nhạc) ngoài trời. Magazine là tạp chí.

questions.questionText: Pick up a _____ at the door to see the list of acts.
questions.explanation: Programme (chương trình) liệt kê tiết mục. Ticket là vé vào cửa.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete the Leisure Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with the correct word.

questions.questionText: Complete: We went to a jazz [0]. | The [1] clapped loudly. | I read a [2] online. | We spent the evening [3] a film at home.
questions.explanation: concert; audience; review; streaming — ngữ cảnh giải trí cuối tuần.

content.template: We went to a jazz [0]. The [1] clapped loudly. I read a [2] online. We spent the evening [3] a film at home.

exercises.title: Review: Vocab Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer for each question.

questions.questionText: Mai read an online _____ before buying tickets for the comedy show.
questions.explanation: Review (bài đánh giá) giúp quyết định mua vé. Programme là chương trình.

questions.questionText: You can _____ the centre's app to see the exhibition timetable.
questions.explanation: Download (tải) app về điện thoại. Streaming là xem phim.

questions.questionText: The jazz _____ in the park starts at seven o'clock.
questions.explanation: Concert (hòa nhạc) ngoài trời. Magazine là tạp chí.

questions.questionText: Pick up a _____ at the door to see the list of acts.
questions.explanation: Programme (chương trình) liệt kê tiết mục. Ticket là vé vào cửa.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Phrasal Verbs and Gerunds
lessons.learningObjective: Use phrasal verbs pick up, find out and take off, and gerunds/infinitives after common verbs.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Correct Form
exercises.instructions: Choose the best word or phrase for each sentence.

questions.questionText: I _____ a free magazine at the arts centre.
questions.explanation: Pick up = nhận/lấy tạp chí miễn phí.

questions.questionText: We need to _____ what time the exhibition closes.
questions.explanation: Find out = tìm hiểu thông tin.

questions.questionText: I enjoy _____ to live concerts.
questions.explanation: Enjoy + -ing: enjoy going.

questions.questionText: She decided _____ the tickets tonight.
questions.explanation: Decide + to-infinitive: decided to download.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete the Grammar
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with the correct form.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] out that student tickets are cheaper. | We [1] up programmes at the door. | They enjoy [2] comedy shows.
questions.explanation: found (find out); pick (pick up); watching (enjoy + -ing).

content.template: I [0] out that student tickets are cheaper. We [1] up programmes at the door. They enjoy [2] comedy shows.

questions.questionText: Complete: The dancers [0] off their shoes. | I want [1] the new app. | We finished [2] the review.
questions.explanation: took (take off); to download (want to); reading (finish + -ing).

content.template: The dancers [0] off their shoes. I want [1] the new app. We finished [2] the review.

exercises.title: Check: Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer. Think carefully.

questions.questionText: Did you _____ when the performance starts?
questions.explanation: Find out + thông tin thời gian.

questions.questionText: He hopes _____ the exhibition tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Hope + to-infinitive.

questions.questionText: The show really _____ after the famous singer arrived.
questions.explanation: Took off = trở nên thành công/nổi tiếng.

questions.questionText: We don't mind _____ at home and streaming films.
questions.explanation: Mind + -ing: mind staying.

exercises.title: Apply: Build the Sentence
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order to make a sentence.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / found out / the concert / starts / at seven.
questions.explanation: I found out the concert starts at seven. — phrasal verb + clause.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: We / enjoy / going / to / exhibitions.
questions.explanation: We enjoy going to exhibitions. — enjoy + gerund.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: She / decided / to / download / the programme.
questions.explanation: She decided to download the programme. — decide + infinitive.

exercises.title: Review: Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer. Think carefully.

questions.questionText: Did you _____ when the performance starts?
questions.explanation: Find out + thông tin thời gian.

questions.questionText: He hopes _____ the exhibition tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Hope + to-infinitive.

questions.questionText: The show really _____ after the famous singer arrived.
questions.explanation: Took off = trở nên thành công/nổi tiếng.

questions.questionText: We don't mind _____ at home and streaming films.
questions.explanation: Mind + -ing: mind staying.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Culture Blog
lessons.learningObjective: Identify the writer's purpose and audience in a short blog about weekend entertainment.

exercises.title: Learn: Read the Blog Post
exercises.instructions: Read the blog post carefully. Answer the detail questions.

passage.title: Weekend Culture Blog — City Arts Centre
passage.text:
POSTED BY MAI — 12 JUNE

Last Saturday my friends and I visited the City Arts Centre. We wanted to see the new photography exhibition before it closes. The audience was small but friendly, and the performance space looked amazing.

First we picked up a free magazine at the entrance. It had a review of last month's concert and tips for downloading the centre's app. I found out that students get cheaper tickets for comedy shows on Fridays.

In the afternoon we watched a short dance performance. The dancers took off their shoes for one piece — it was surprising! After that we read online reviews on our phones. Most people loved the exhibition, but a few wanted more seats.

We spent the evening at home streaming a film. My brother prefers streaming to going out, but I still enjoy live events. Next week there is a jazz concert in the park. I will download the programme tonight and invite my classmates.

If you like art and music, check the centre website. You can find out about every exhibition and performance there.
passage.imagePrompt: A blog-style illustration of teenagers at an arts centre with exhibition posters, a concert flyer and phones showing streaming apps; bright cultural venue.

questions.questionText: What did Mai and her friends see on Saturday afternoon?
questions.explanation: They watched a short dance performance in the afternoon.

questions.questionText: How did Mai spend the evening?
questions.explanation: We spent the evening at home streaming a film.

exercises.title: Practice: Words in the Blog
exercises.instructions: Read the blog post again. Answer about vocabulary and meaning.

passage.title: Weekend Culture Blog — City Arts Centre

passage.imagePrompt: A blog-style illustration of teenagers at an arts centre with exhibition posters, a concert flyer and phones showing streaming apps; bright cultural venue.

questions.questionText: In the blog, when Mai says they 'picked up' a magazine, she means they _____.
questions.explanation: Picked up a free magazine at the entrance = lấy/nhận tạp chí.

choices.text: collected a free copy at the entrance

questions.questionText: Why does Mai mention her brother?
questions.explanation: He prefers streaming to going out — contrast với Mai thích live events.

choices.text: To contrast staying home with going to live events

exercises.title: Check: Purpose and Audience
exercises.instructions: Read the blog post one more time. These questions need careful thinking.

questions.questionText: Who is the most likely audience for this blog post?
questions.explanation: Mai writes for friends/classmates interested in arts — teenagers/students.

choices.text: Young people who enjoy culture and free-time activities

questions.questionText: What is Mai's main purpose in writing this post?
questions.explanation: Chia sẻ trải nghiệm và khuyên đọc website — recommend arts centre.

choices.text: To share her weekend experience and encourage others to visit

exercises.title: Apply: Match Facts from the Blog
exercises.instructions: Use what you read. Match each item to the correct fact.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Tickets and Weekend Plans
lessons.learningObjective: Follow social exchanges about buying tickets and planning cultural activities.

exercises.title: Learn: At the Ticket Office
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Answer the first two questions.

script.title: Buying Concert Tickets

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: Hello. I would like two tickets for the jazz concert on Saturday, please.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.text: Certainly. The performance starts at seven o'clock in the main hall.

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: Great. I read a review in your magazine. The audience loved the last concert.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.text: Yes! You can pick up a programme at the door. Student tickets are twelve pounds each.

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: Perfect. Can I pay by card? I found out about the discount on your website.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.text: Of course. Here are your tickets. Enjoy the show!

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: Thank you. We are really looking forward to it.

script.audioNotes: Friendly ticket office exchange, clear speech. Approx. 45 seconds.

questions.questionText: What tickets does Alex want?
questions.explanation: Two tickets for the jazz concert on Saturday.

questions.questionText: What time does the performance start?
questions.explanation: The performance starts at seven o'clock.

exercises.title: Practice: More from the Ticket Office
exercises.instructions: Listen again to the same conversation. Answer the next questions.

questions.questionText: How much is each student ticket?
questions.explanation: Student tickets are twelve pounds each.

questions.questionText: What can Alex pick up at the door?
questions.explanation: You can pick up a programme at the door.

choices.distractorNote: Read about, not pick up there

exercises.title: Check: Friends Planning Sunday
exercises.instructions: Listen to a new conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: Friends Planning the Weekend

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.text: What shall we do on Sunday? There is a new exhibition at the museum.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: I prefer staying home and streaming a series. I am tired this week.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.text: Come on! The magazine said the photography exhibition is excellent. The audience gave it five stars.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: OK, but only if we pick up food on the way. I want to find out what time it closes.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.text: It closes at six. After that we could watch a comedy performance nearby.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Sounds good. I will download the tickets tonight.

lines.speaker: Sofia
lines.text: Great. I will read the online review again before we go.

script.audioNotes: Casual café chat, natural pace. Approx. 45 seconds.

questions.questionText: What does Sofia want to do on Sunday?
questions.explanation: There is a new exhibition at the museum.

questions.questionText: What time does the exhibition close?
questions.explanation: It closes at six.

questions.questionText: What will Ben do tonight?
questions.explanation: I will download the tickets tonight.

exercises.title: Apply: Match What You Heard
exercises.instructions: Listen again to the ticket office conversation. Match each item to the correct detail.

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Invite a Friend
lessons.learningObjective: Write a short message inviting a friend to a concert or exhibition.

exercises.title: Learn: Invitation Phrases
exercises.instructions: Complete each gap with a word from the box: concert, exhibition, download, ticket, hope.

questions.questionText: Complete: Hi Ben, | Would you like to come to a jazz [0] on Saturday? | There is also a photo [1] at the arts centre. | We can [2] the programme tonight. | I [3] you can come!
questions.explanation: concert; exhibition; download; hope — khung tin nhắn mời bạn.

content.template:
Hi Ben,

Would you like to come to a jazz [0] on Saturday? There is also a photo [1] at the arts centre. We can [2] the programme tonight.

I [3] you can come!

Mai

exercises.title: Practice: Build Invitation Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order to make correct sentences.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / enjoy / going / to / concerts.
questions.explanation: I enjoy going to concerts. — enjoy + gerund.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: We / found out / the / tickets / are / cheaper / online.
questions.explanation: We found out the tickets are cheaper online. — find out + clause.

exercises.title: Check: Invite a Friend to an Event
exercises.instructions: Write a short message to a friend. Write at least 25 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a message to your friend Ben. Invite him to go with you to a concert or exhibition at the City Arts Centre next weekend.
prompts: Say which event you want to see (concert or exhibition).
Say when and where it is.
Tell him how to get tickets or download information.
Say why you think he will enjoy it.
successCriteria: Clear invitation to a specific event

modelAnswer.text:
Hi Ben,

Would you like to come to the jazz concert in the park next Saturday? It starts at seven o'clock. I found out that student tickets are only twelve pounds. We can download the programme tonight and read the review online. I think you will enjoy it because the audience loved the last concert.

Hope you can come!
Mai

grammar.criteria: Uses phrasal verbs or gerunds/infinitives correctly (e.g. want to go, enjoy watching).

vocabulary.criteria: Uses leisure words (concert, exhibition, ticket, review, audience) appropriately.

organization.criteria: Message has greeting, clear details and friendly closing.

taskAchievement.criteria: Invites friend with event details; at least 25 words.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi ở A2.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete the Message Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the message frames with the correct unit words.

questions.questionText: Complete: Hi Sofia, | The dance [0] was amazing! | The [1] clapped for ten minutes. | I read your [2] online. | Let's go to the comedy [3] on Friday.
questions.explanation: performance; audience; review; show/comedy — hoàn thiện tin nhắn về sự kiện.

content.template:
Hi Sofia,

The dance [0] was amazing! The [1] clapped for ten minutes. I read your [2] online. Let's go to the comedy [3] on Friday.

Alex

exercises.title: Review: Invite a Friend to an Event
exercises.instructions: Write a short message to a friend. Write at least 25 words.

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Talk About Free Time
lessons.learningObjective: Answer questions about entertainment preferences, concerts and streaming.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Best Reply
exercises.instructions: Imagine an examiner asks you a question. Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What do you like doing in your free time? You say:
questions.explanation: Enjoy + -ing: enjoy going to concerts.

choices.text: I enjoy going to concerts and exhibitions.

questions.questionText: Examiner: How do you usually get tickets? You say:
questions.explanation: Found out + thông tin mua vé online.

choices.text: I usually pick up the prices online.
I usually find out the prices online and download tickets.
I usually take off tickets online.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Do you prefer live events or streaming? You say:
questions.explanation: So sánh tự nhiên live events vs streaming.

choices.text: I like live magazines at home.
I like live concerts, but I sometimes enjoy streaming films at home.
I enjoy audience films at concerts.

exercises.title: Practice: Best Response
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase you would say in each situation.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Tell me about a concert you went to. You say:
questions.explanation: Mô tả ngắn concert + audience reaction.

choices.text: I went to a jazz download.
I went to a jazz concert. The audience was fantastic.
I went to a streaming audience.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What did you decide to do last weekend? You say:
questions.explanation: Decide + to-infinitive.

choices.text: I decided visiting the photography exhibition.
I decided to visit the photography exhibition.
I decided visit the photography exhibition.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Would you like to review a film for the school magazine? You say:
questions.explanation: Would like + to-infinitive — lời đồng ý lịch sự.

choices.text: Yes, I would like writing a review.
Yes, I would like to write a review.
Yes, I like to writing a review.

exercises.title: Check: Free Time Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions about entertainment. Speak for up to two minutes.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo bốn tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Situational Responses
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say in each situation.

questions.questionText: Your friend asks if the concert was good. You say:
questions.explanation: Mô tả performance + audience — phản hồi tự nhiên.

choices.text: Yes! The magazine was great and the ticket loved it.
Yes! The performance was great and the audience loved it.
Yes! The download was great and streaming loved it.

questions.questionText: You arrive at the venue early. You tell your friend:
questions.explanation: Pick up programme — phrasal verb trong tình huống thực.

choices.text: Let's find out a programme at the door.
Let's pick up a programme at the door.
Let's take off a programme at the door.

questions.questionText: The examiner asks: Is streaming popular with teenagers? You say:
questions.explanation: Đưa ý kiến + ví dụ ngắn về streaming.

choices.text: Yes, many teenagers enjoy to stream at the concert venue only.
Yes, many teenagers enjoy streaming films and series at home.
No, teenagers never download or stream anything.

exercises.title: Review: Free Time Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions about entertainment. Speak for up to two minutes.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo bốn tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.
